---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEAT]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: AdvDebug

---

## What would you like to see?
A short description of the idea.

## Why would it help?
What problem would it solve, or what would it improve?

## Anything else?
Links, screenshots, examples, or a rough idea of how it could work.
